deep_dive.title: A Perception-Manipulation Robotics System for Food Cutting
deep_dive.abstract: In the development of cooking robots, mastering the task of cutting is crucial. A significant challenge lies in the diverse properties of food, which necessitate distinct cutting policies and even different knives for optimal processing. This paper presents a perception-manipulation framework for food-cutting tasks. Our system features a knife selection module that utilizes force data from a preliminary fixed trial cut to select the appropriate knife for the given food. This is followed by an adaptive cutting phase using reinforcement learning (RL) to balance cutting speed and energy efficiency. In our experiments, the knife selection module achieved 100% successful rate on unseen food, and we compared the performances of fixed policy, RL policy, with human operators. Our method not only achieves high performance but also demonstrates comparable results to those of human participants.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Reinforcement learning for adaptive robot arm cutting control
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 强化学习用于机器人臂自适应切割控制
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 强化学习用于机器人臂自适应切割控制
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 强化学习用于机器人臂自适应切割控制
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a perception-manipulation framework for food cutting using RL for adaptive cutting, achieving 100% knife selection success on unseen food.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 烹饪机器人切割任务面临食物多样性挑战，不同食物需不同切割策略和刀具。本文提出感知-操作框架，包含基于力的刀片选择模块和强化学习自适应切割阶段。实验显示刀片选择在未见食物上100%成功，RL切割策略在效率和能耗上优于固定策略。该方法展示了强化学习在机器人精细操作中的应用潜力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 烹饪机器人切割任务面临食物多样性挑战，不同食物需不同切割策略和刀具。本文提出感知-操作框架，包含基于力的刀片选择模块和强化学习自适应切割阶段。实验显示刀片选择在未见食物上100%成功，RL切割策略在效率和能耗上优于固定策略。该方法展示了强化学习在机器人精细操作中的应用潜力。

deep_dive.title: LAMP: Latent Motion Prior-Guided Real-World Learning for Dexterous Hand Manipulation
deep_dive.abstract: Real-world learning for dexterous hands remains brittle because high-dimensional hand actions amplify imitation errors and make reinforcement-learning exploration prone to contact-breaking motion. While combining imitation learning (IL) with online reinforcement learning (RL) can reduce manual supervision, unconstrained exploration in raw hand-action spaces is sample-inefficient and risky for physical hardware. We introduce a latent motion prior module (\prior{}) that maps recent hand-action histories to a compact, history-conditioned latent prior and decodes continuous latent commands into executable high-dimensional hand targets. Built on this prior, \method{} is a three-stage real-world dexterous learning framework: it pretrains \prior{} from demonstrations, trains a visuomotor policy that predicts native arm commands and latent hand-action offsets, and improves the policy with online residual RL in the same latent hand-action space. This shared, decodable interface lets residual exploration make local corrections near demonstrated, contact-consistent hand motions rather than perturbing every finger joint independently. We evaluate \method{} on four real-robot dexterous manipulation tasks against raw, linear, and discrete hand-action interfaces. Starting from small task-specific demonstration sets, \method{} achieves a 56.25\% average IL success rate and raises it to 98.75\% after online RL, reaching 100\% final success on three tasks and 95\% on the remaining task.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: reinforcement learning for dexterous hand manipulation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于灵巧手操作的强化学习
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于灵巧手操作的强化学习
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于灵巧手操作的强化学习
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes LAMP, a framework combining imitation learning and reinforcement learning for dexterous hand manipulation, using a latent motion prior to constrain exploration and improve sample efficiency, achieving robust real-world learning.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有灵巧手操作的真实世界学习因高维动作空间导致模仿误差放大和强化学习探索易脱离接触。本文提出LAMP框架，引入潜在运动先验模块，将近期动作历史编码为紧凑潜变量并解码为高维手部目标，实现模仿学习与在线强化学习的结合。实验表明该方法在真实机器人手上能够高效学习复杂操作技能，显著减少硬件风险并提高样本效率。该工作为将强化学习应用于高维机器人控制提供了有效范例。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有灵巧手操作的真实世界学习因高维动作空间导致模仿误差放大和强化学习探索易脱离接触。本文提出LAMP框架，引入潜在运动先验模块，将近期动作历史编码为紧凑潜变量并解码为高维手部目标，实现模仿学习与在线强化学习的结合。实验表明该方法在真实机器人手上能够高效学习复杂操作技能，显著减少硬件风险并提高样本效率。该工作为将强化学习应用于高维机器人控制提供了有效范例。

quick_skim.title: Reachability-Preserving Bellman Operator for the Discounted Reach-Cost Value Function: Uniting Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability and Reinforcement Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability provides rigorous safety and reachability guarantees for continuous-time dynamical systems, but its numerical solution suffers from the curse of dimensionality. Deep reinforcement learning (DRL), by contrast, offers scalable sample-based methods. However, RL is typically built around additive cumulative rewards; whereas, reachability objectives are inherently non-additive. This mismatch makes a direct bridge between HJ reachability and RL nontrivial. Recent discounted formulations have either introduced contraction by altering the original reachability semantics, or preserved exact semantics on the HJ side without a corresponding Bellman fixed-point characterization. In this paper, we close this gap by building on a semantics-preserving discounted reach-based value function and deriving a non-additive Bellman operator whose unique fixed point exactly matches the value function in the HJ formulation. We prove that discounting makes this operator contractive, yielding existence, uniqueness, and convergence of value iteration. Furthermore, we establish the equivalence between the HJ and Bellman characterizations, and show that RL can be interpreted as a sample-based approximation scheme for the same fixed-point equation. This yields a principled and semantically exact connection between HJ reachability and RL, enabling learning-based methods to approximate reachability value functions while preserving their safety-critical meaning. As a result, the proposed framework opens the door to scalable, data-driven computation of reachable sets and safety certificates in high-dimensional systems. Numerical experiments demonstrate close agreement with HJ solutions, confirm preservation of reachability semantics via alignment of zero level sets, and support the interpretation of reinforcement learning as a sample-based solver of the proposed Bellman operator.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Bridges HJ reachability with RL, applicable to safe control of robotic arms
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 将HJ可达性与强化学习结合，可应用于机械臂安全控制
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 将HJ可达性与强化学习结合，可应用于机械臂安全控制
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 将HJ可达性与强化学习结合，可应用于机械臂安全控制
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a reachability-preserving Bellman operator that unites HJ reachability theory and deep RL, enabling safety guarantees in continuous-time control without altering reachability semantics.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对连续时间动态系统的安全可达性问题，提出一种保持可达性的Bellman算子，将Hamilton-Jacobi可达性理论与深度强化学习统一起来。通过定义折扣可达代价价值函数，该方法在不改变原始可达性语义的前提下引入了收缩性，使得RL方法可以用于求解可达性目标。实验表明，该方法在低维系统上保持了HJ的精确性，同时具备扩展到高维系统的潜力，为机器人安全控制提供了理论桥梁。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对连续时间动态系统的安全可达性问题，提出一种保持可达性的Bellman算子，将Hamilton-Jacobi可达性理论与深度强化学习统一起来。通过定义折扣可达代价价值函数，该方法在不改变原始可达性语义的前提下引入了收缩性，使得RL方法可以用于求解可达性目标。实验表明，该方法在低维系统上保持了HJ的精确性，同时具备扩展到高维系统的潜力，为机器人安全控制提供了理论桥梁。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning for robot arm control
